top_signals.title: 10-year Treasury yield climbs to 4.57% as jumping oil prices reignite inflation fears
top_signals.summary: Treasury yields surged after President Donald Trump told the NATO summit that the ceasefire with Iran is over.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High as Global Bond Selloff Deepens
top_signals.summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports After Ukraine’s Refinery Attacks
top_signals.summary: Russia banned exports of diesel in order to avoid domestic shortages after a flurry of attacks by Ukrainian drones on the nation’s refineries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says interim accord to end war is ‘over’ after Iranian strikes
top_signals.summary: The U.S. president's remarks came after the two sides traded strikes again, marking the most serious threat to their interim peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Segro lays out defence as it battles £12.6bn takeover attempt by US rival
top_signals.summary: UK property group believes 925p a share offer by Prologis undervalues its warehouse and data centres business
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK scientists propose tiny satellites to sniff out nuclear weapons in space
top_signals.summary: Idea would help deal with danger of conflict in increasingly crowded orbits around Earth
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets: BBG
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Citadel abandons multi-year crypto lawsuit to focus on bankruptcy order against an ex-employee
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mixed signals, research findings, and policy judgements − speech by Catherine L. Mann
top_signals.summary: Given at the Natixis CIB Private Debt Forum

top_signals.title: Nigel Farage to quit UK Parliament, seek new mandate amid probes into crypto-linked gifts
top_signals.summary: Nigel Farage resigned as an MP amid two probes over gifts from Tether investor Christopher Harborne and convicted fraudster George Cottrell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cardano founding entity EMURGO steps down from Pentad governance role after wallet exploit
top_signals.summary: The exploit, which leveraged a flaw in the wallet's address generation system, drained roughly 16 million ADA worth about $2.4 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
